text:
Promising results in terms of tolerance and maintenance of remission at 12 weeks (98). Partial or adapted diets are still considered experimental.

Post-surgery

After ileocecal resection, a colonoscopy is recommended within 6–12 months following surgery. Patients at high inflammatory risk must receive prophylaxis.
